stories.headline: FISA Collapses Overnight — Johnson Gets Two-Week Band-Aid
stories.summary: Speaker Mike Johnson's compromise FISA extension failed 200-220 when Republicans broke ranks. A two-week extension passed via unanimous consent, kicking the can to early May.

stories.headline: GOP Can't Stop Fighting Itself — House vs. Senate Tensions Deepen
stories.summary: The FISA flop is one symptom of a broader Republican breakdown. Unresolved conflicts include the DHS shutdown, budget reconciliation, SAVE America Act, and appropriations.

stories.headline: NJ-11 Result: Mejia Wins by 20 Points
stories.summary: Democrat Analilia Mejia cruised to victory in the NJ-11 special election, beating Republican Joe Hathaway by 20 points — exceeding most projections.

stories.headline: Cherfilus-McCormick Ethics: CBC Faces Expulsion Vote April 21
stories.summary: Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick faces a full House Ethics Committee sanction hearing after 26 ethics violations were found, including allegedly stealing $5M from FEMA.

stories.headline: ~20 House Republicans Outraised by Democratic Challengers
stories.summary: Q1 FEC analysis finds roughly 20 House Republicans outraised by Democratic challengers. PA incumbent Scott Perry outraised by Janelle Stelson, who holds more cash-on-hand.

stories.headline: Iran War Powers: CPC Pushing Weekly House Votes
stories.summary: The Congressional Progressive Caucus discussed forcing repeated House votes on Iran war powers resolutions, putting every House Republican on record.

stories.headline: PECO Withdraws 12.5% Rate Hike — Shapiro Claims $510M Win
stories.summary: PECO withdrew its proposed 12.5% electric and 11.4% gas rate increase after direct pressure from Gov. Shapiro, who called the request 'pure greed.' 1.7 million Pennsylvanians will collectively save $510 million.

stories.headline: Data Center Moratorium Battle Intensifies in PA Legislature
stories.summary: Multiple competing bills target data centers in eastern PA — from moratoriums to fast-track permitting. Two bipartisan oversight bills already passed the PA House.

stories.headline: PA-07 Democratic Primary: Questions Around Brooks Campaign
stories.summary: With the May 19 primary a month away, questions are surfacing around Bob Brooks' campaign in PA-07 (Lehigh Valley).

stories.headline: Stelson Tops All PA Congressional Candidates in Q1 Fundraising
stories.summary: Democratic challenger Janelle Stelson outraised every congressional candidate in Pennsylvania in Q1 2026, nearly doubling incumbent Rep. Scott Perry's haul.

stories.headline: Nuclear Waste Cleanup Begins in Armstrong County, PA
stories.summary: The federal government began long-awaited cleanup of a nuclear waste dump in Parks Township, near Apollo — site of decades of cancer cases and lawsuits.

stories.headline: PA Counties Insurance Pool Drops 287(g)/ICE Coverage
stories.summary: The PA Counties Risk Pool voted to exclude liability coverage for 287(g) immigration enforcement partnerships with ICE. Counties will need alternative coverage.

stories.headline: PECO Withdrawal — Regulatory Landmark for PA Utility Market
stories.summary: PECO's withdrawal of its rate increases is the most significant PA utility regulatory event this week. Sets a political template for how Shapiro will approach future large IOU rate filings.

stories.headline: Energy Market Dashboard: Oil Elevated, Gas Near 17-Month Lows
stories.summary: WTI ~$92/bbl (Hormuz tensions), Henry Hub $2.68/MMBtu (+1.16%), Central App Coal ~$87/ton, RGGI ~$25/ton. Oil risk premium intact; gas oversupply weighing.

stories.headline: FERC Co-Location: Reply Briefs Due Today
stories.summary: Deadline for reply briefs in FERC's proceeding directing PJM to establish co-location rules for large loads with grid-connected generation. Final order expected in coming months.

stories.headline: PA Data Center Energy Stakes — Grid Impact Analysis
stories.summary: Large data center load growth in PA would increase PJM capacity and transmission costs. Ratepayer protection — whether connection costs are socialized — is the core interest.
